title: Genesis 00
wikitext:
[]: Genesis 0:0             Quote Post by MasterOfPuppets » Sat Mar 28, 2009 10:44 pm Anyone know where I can watch Genesis 0:0? Preferably both parts w/English subs. Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Mar 29, 2009 1:32 am The internet? There was a raw torrent some years ago, but I've not seen a subbed version.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Mar 29, 2009 2:50 am Brikhaus' Evangelion Extras DVD had Genesis 0:0 subbed. I have it on VHS but no subtitles.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sun Mar 29, 2009 5:21 am I thought 0:0 didn't have anything new on it besides some interviews.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Mar 29, 2009 5:56 am Character bios and interviews with the directors and voice actors.

[]:             Quote Post by MasterOfPuppets » Sun Mar 29, 2009 9:35 am Hmm, thanks, I can't seem to find the torrent but I'll keep looking. You'd think something like this would be easily available.

[]:             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Sun Mar 29, 2009 12:00 pm is that the one that has the original long opening on it?

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sun Mar 29, 2009 6:06 pm Twsa'teotu wrote: is that the one that has the original long opening on it?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Mar 29, 2009 7:42 pm Do you people want me to reseed the Evangelion Extras DVD? It's got all that stuff on it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 29, 2009 8:23 pm BrikHaus wrote: Do you people want me to reseed the Evangelion Extras DVD? It's got all that stuff on it.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Mar 29, 2009 8:34 pm I can't check the actual VHS that I have right now, I can't remember everything that was on it because my VCR is broken. The rip of the extras DVD that Brikhaus made comprises of: Extended OP (about 4 minutes) Extended ED (about 4 minutes) After the End picsub (about 20 something minutes) Karaoke OP Genesis 0:0 "The Light From the Darkness" (interviews with voice actresses, character bios, interview with Sadamoto, more character bios, interview with Ueda Motoki) (about 30 minutes) Genesis 0:0 "Final Chapter: Neon Genesis" (interview with Anno (this is hilarious)) (about 4 minutes) Some Cruel Angel's Thesis AMVs (think these may have been official) Filmed part of theatrical episode #26, Compilatory special edition (subbed, about 11 minutes) Series and movies trailers (about 10 minutes total) Spike Spencer's parody dub of the end of 26 (about 2+ minutes) PM me if you want a copy of this rip

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Mar 29, 2009 11:25 pm Reichu wrote: BrikHaus wrote: Do you people want me to reseed the Evangelion Extras DVD? It's got all that stuff on it.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Fri Apr 10, 2009 4:25 am Please do upload the disc. It sounds interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by pikadourei » Sun Apr 12, 2009 3:47 pm I'm interested as well. In the interviews particularly :)

[]:             Quote Post by arilando » Fri Feb 08, 2013 9:32 am So is this uploaded somewhere? Sorry to revive an old topic.

[]:             Quote Post by v3g4n » Fri Nov 29, 2013 1:34 pm I recently acquired the Renewal box set and I'm going to rip the bonus DVD. maybe someone can help out with subtitles?

[]:             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Sat Nov 30, 2013 6:57 pm I'd be interested in a subtitle version since I have the actual releases. Next year I plan to copy my laserdiscs and VHS tapes to computer.

[]:             Quote Post by v3g4n » Sun Dec 01, 2013 12:14 pm I finished ripping the Renewal Bonus DVD. I need to find a place to upload it.

[]: Re:             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Tue Jul 13, 2021 5:19 pm Ornette wrote: Genesis 0:0 "The Light From the Darkness" (interviews with voice actresses, character bios, interview with Sadamoto, more character bios, interview with Ueda Motoki) (about 30 minutes) Genesis 0:0 "Final Chapter: Neon Genesis" (interview with Anno (this is hilarious)) (about 4 minutes)
